summary: Comprehensive testing of Referral Settings, Points Wallet, and Affiliate System. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend pages verified: Affiliate Landing Page, Admin Referral Settings, Admin Affiliates, Admin Affiliate Commissions, Admin Affiliate Payouts, Customer My Points Page, Customer Dashboard.

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'Failed to load referral settings' toast briefly when navigating directly without active session, but loads correctly with cached auth token

TestReferralSettingsAdmin.test_get_referral_settings: PASS - Returns full settings object with all fields
TestReferralSettingsAdmin.test_update_referral_settings: PASS - Updates and restores settings correctly

TestCustomerPointsAPI.test_get_my_points: PASS - Returns wallet (null for new users) and transactions array

TestAffiliatePayoutsAPI.test_create_and_manage_payout_request: PASS - Create → Approve → Mark Paid workflow

affiliate_landing_page.benefits_section: PASS - Shows 'What you'll get' with benefits

admin_referral_settings.reward_rules_section: PASS - Reward mode, trigger event, amounts visible

admin_affiliates.create_form: PASS - Name, email, code, commission type/value fields present
admin_affiliates.partner10_visible: PASS - Seeded affiliate PARTNER10 with 10% commission shown
admin_affiliates.delete_btn: PASS - Delete button present for each affiliate

admin_affiliate_commissions.stats_cards: PASS - Total Commissions, Pending, Total Amount, Pending Amount
admin_affiliate_commissions.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No commissions yet' with explanation

admin_affiliate_payouts.create_form: PASS - Affiliate ID, Email, Amount, Notes fields present
admin_affiliate_payouts.payout_list: PASS - Shows test payout with status badge

customer_my_points.points_balance_card: PASS - Shows Points Balance (0 for new users)
customer_my_points.how_points_work: PASS - 3-step guide (Refer Friends → Earn Points → Redeem)
customer_my_points.points_activity: PASS - Transaction history section with empty state

customer_dashboard.my_referrals_card: PASS - 'My Referrals' card with 'Share your code and earn rewards'
customer_dashboard.my_points_card: PASS - 'My Points' card with 'View your points balance and activity'

seed_data_creation: Affiliate 'Partner Marketing Agency' (PARTNER10) was pre-seeded. A test payout request (TZS 50,000) was created and marked as paid during API testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral Settings, Points Wallet, and Affiliate System fully tested. Key routes: 1) GET/PUT /api/admin/referral-settings for admin config, 2) GET /api/customer/points/me and /balance for customer points, 3) /api/admin/affiliates for CRUD, 4) /api/affiliates/code/{code} for public lookup, 5) /api/admin/affiliate-commissions and /api/affiliate-payouts/admin for commission/payout management. Frontend pages at /admin/referral-settings, /admin/affiliates, /admin/affiliate-commissions, /admin/affiliate-payouts, /a/{code}, /dashboard/points all working.
features_verified: GET /api/admin/referral-settings - Returns referral program settings - WORKING
GET /api/customer/points/me - Returns wallet and transactions - WORKING
GET /api/customer/points/balance - Returns points balance summary - WORKING
GET /api/admin/points/wallets - Lists all user wallets - WORKING
POST /api/affiliate-payouts/admin/{id}/mark-paid - Marks payout as paid - WORKING
Admin Referral Settings page at /admin/referral-settings - WORKING
Admin Affiliate Commissions page at /admin/affiliate-commissions - WORKING
Admin Affiliate Payouts page at /admin/affiliate-payouts - WORKING
Customer Dashboard shows My Points and My Referrals cards - WORKING
